settings.title: Shipping information
settings.body:
We work with trusted logistics partners to deliver your orders safely and on time. Shipping timelines vary by destination and product availability.

Processing time: Orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days.

Domestic delivery: Standard shipping usually arrives within 5–7 business days.

International delivery: International orders may take 10–21 business days depending on customs and carrier schedules.

For sourcing and wholesale enquiries, please contact us for tailored shipping arrangements.
